name: 数据统计
subject: math
domain_name: 统计与概率 / Stats & Probability / Stats & Prob
curriculum_points:
E2.12 Differentiation
Notes and examples
1 Estimate gradients of curves by drawing
tangents.
2 Use the derivatives of functions of the form axn,
where a is a rational constant and n is a positive
integer or zero, and simple sums of not more
than three of these.
3 Apply differentiation to gradients and stationary
points (turning points).
4 Discriminate between maxima and minima by
any method.

E2.11 Sketching curves
Notes and examples
Recognise, sketch and interpret graphs of the
following functions:
(a) linear
(b) quadratic
(c) cubic
(d) reciprocal
(e) exponential.
Knowledge of turning points, roots and symmetry is
required.
Knowledge of vertical and horizontal asymptotes is
required.
Finding turning points of quadratics by completing
the square is required.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「数据统计」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：E2.12 Differentiation
Notes and examples
1 Estimate gradients of curves by drawing
tangents.
2 Use the derivatives of fu…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：E2.11 Sketching curves
Notes and examples
Recognise, sketch and interpret graphs… 对理解「数据统计」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
